message:
Add E2E test for related prompts navigation and sync state

Adds test coverage for the related prompts feature and syncs project
tracking state.

## prompt-detail.spec.ts

New test: "related prompts section navigates to another prompt"

### Test Steps
1. Navigate to a known prompt page (/prompts/idea-wizard)
2. Wait for page load including related prompts section
3. Click the first related prompt link
4. Verify navigation to a different prompt page
5. Confirm the new page displays correct content

### Test Implementation
- Uses logger.step for clear test output
- Waits for Related Prompts section to be visible
- Captures related prompt title before clicking
- Uses Promise.all for navigation + click synchronization
- Validates URL change and content match

```typescript
await logger.step("open first related prompt", async () => {
  const relatedSection = page.locator("section", { hasText: "Related Prompts" });
  const relatedLink = relatedSection.getByRole("link").first();
  relatedTitle = (await relatedLink.locator("h3").first().innerText()).trim();

  await Promise.all([
    page.waitForURL((url) => url.pathname !== "/prompts/idea-wizard"),
    relatedLink.click(),
  ]);
});
```

## Also Included

- Beads tracking state sync
- Final golden test async updates
